dialogueChunks.intro: We did it, {player_name}. Against all odds, we managed to {quest_action}. {quest_focus_The} is ours.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} no longer a concern, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} secured. {quest_ally} is already talking about what comes next.
dialogueChunks.outro: None of this would have been possible without your courage. You turned a wild ambition into reality.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I can hardly believe it worked. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been opened, and what we found inside exceeded every expectation.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} now within our grasp. The scholars and traders are already making plans. {quest_threat_The} proved formidable, but your determination proved greater.
dialogueChunks.outro: History will remember this enterprise. And your name will be part of it.

dialogueChunks.intro: The impossible is now possible, {player_name}. Thanks to your efforts to {quest_action}, {quest_focus_the} is finally accessible.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Trade caravans, scholars, settlers: they will all benefit from what you have accomplished. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} no longer just a dream.
dialogueChunks.outro: You dared greatly, and the rewards speak for themselves. Thank you.

dialogueChunks.intro: They laughed when I proposed this, {player_name}. Every single one of them. Nobody is laughing now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} is open, {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} secured, and the {enemy_type_plural} that guarded it are dead or scattered. {quest_ally} is drafting supply routes that will cut travel times by half.
dialogueChunks.outro: You fought through everything this enterprise threw at us. I hope you are as proud as I am.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, what we found beyond {quest_focus_the} surpasses anything in the old records. This changes the map itself.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is still cataloguing what is there, but the early reports are extraordinary. {quest_stakes_The} alone would have justified the risk, but there is more. Much more. {quest_threat_The} nearly stopped us, and without you it would have.
dialogueChunks.outro: Great enterprises need great people. You were ours.
